files_changed: backend/app/lib/active_learning.py (NEW — entropy math + suggestion engine + summary)
principle: Rather than asking operators to label every historical day, surface the days whose label is most likely to reduce model uncertainty. Binary entropy H(p) = -p*log2(p) - (1-p)*log2(1-p) is maximum (1.0 bit) at p=0.5 and falls off toward the extremes. The 'model is on the fence' band [0.35, 0.65] is the sweet spot for active learning.
what_it_does: Replays the production model path (predict + calibrator) for each of the last 7 days at noon UTC.
Computes binary entropy of the resulting p_bad for each date.
Filters out dates that already have an OperatorVerification or a high-confidence NoDiveLabel (operator already spoke).
Filters out dates where p_bad is outside [0.35, 0.65] (model was confident — asking is wasteful).
Sorts remaining dates by entropy descending, returns the top 3.
Each suggestion includes site_key, date, p_bad, uncertainty, model_source, rank, and a human-readable reason.
ui_integration: ActiveLearningNudge component renders above the KPI strip on the dashboard.
Pre-fills verdict with the model's implied call (p>=0.5 => no_dive, else dive) so the common case is one click.
Confirm button POSTs to /verify with the chosen verdict, no_go_reason, confidence, and a 'active_learning:' comments tag for traceability.
After verify, the date is added to OperatorVerification and immediately drops out of the queue on the next re-fetch.
Skip button moves to the next suggestion without recording anything.
Show-all button expands the full ranked list with entropy scores.

live_verification.note: All three suggestions are at p_bad=0.45 because the rule-based scorer's 'MODERATE' bucket maps to 0.45 — exactly the center of the uncertainty band. Once LSTM/XGB models are trained and produce continuous probabilities, the entropy distribution will spread out and the nudge will surface genuinely diverse 'on the fence' dates.

tests.phase8_skipped_reason: test_verify_closes_the_active_learning_loop skips if no date lands in the uncertainty band (rule-based scorer outputs 0.45 so most days do, but timing edge cases)

future_extensions: Add a 'mark all dates I was on the boat' bulk action so operators can back-fill seasons in a few clicks.
Show the suggestion on the operator's Settings page as a 'labeling backlog' counter so they see total volume.

When the LSTM/XGB model is finally trained (post-Phase 3 thresholds), the suggestions will spread out across the [0.35, 0.65] band instead of clustering at 0.45 — re-run scripts/train_model.py to see.
Move the 'model said X%' callout to the Verify.jsx page too, so operators can fill from the Verify flow.
next_phase: All 8 phases complete. Roadmap #8 is shipped end-to-end. Future work (operator backlog #11, cold-path #15) is documented in SeaSID.md but out of scope for the original 8-phase plan.
